question: Show the transmitters of the radios and the number of city channels they are associated with.
sql: SELECT radio.Transmitter, COUNT(city_channel_radio.City_channel_ID) AS num_city_channels FROM radio JOIN city_channel_radio ON radio.Radio_ID = city_channel_radio.Radio_ID GROUP BY radio.Transmitter;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个发射机对应的城市场道数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求展示发射机和其关联的城市场道数量，SQL反向翻译描述通过连接radio和city_channel_radio表，按发射机分组并统计城市场道数量，准确表达了这一意图。
